learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Build your advisory business blueprint
learn.summary: Complete Value (what & how), Activities (how you operate), and Income (how you earn) on the FEC.
bullets: Value: what you deliver and how it helps your customer
Activities: how your practice operates week to week
Income: how you earn as a financial entrepreneur
Canvas wizard walks you through each block step by step
learn.callout: You and Customer from Weeks 1–2 feed this week’s canvas work.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: FEC design studio
workshop.summary: Facilitated canvas building with squad feedback.
bullets: Fill Value, Activities, and Income with coach guidance
Squad peer review of one canvas block
Identify gaps before Week 4 pitch prep
workshop.callout: Mark complete after your classroom session.

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Complete FEC canvas blocks
assignment.summary: Finish Value, Activities, and Income in the canvas wizard.
bullets: Use the canvas wizard for guided prompts
Align each block with your persona and Dream Board
Save progress so Week 4 can synthesize your 3-year plan

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: Is your business model clear?
prompts: What will you refine before your venture pitch?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 3 complete
submit.summary: Unlock Week 4 — 3-Year Plan and Venture Pitch (Stage Gate 1).
